title: justicia vahliana
intro: Justicia vahliana, also known as the "Kaduva" or "Vahli's justicia," is a plant species native to the Western Ghats of India, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Justicia vahliana include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions, infusions, and powders, and is also used as a topical application for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
